description: Machine availability — percentage of time in production status vs total time. Accepts numeric (1=running, 2/3=standby) or common string codes (RUNNING/PRODUCING vs IDLE/STOPPED/SETUP/MAINTENANCE).

calculation.cypher: CASE WHEN m.Machine_Status = 1 OR m.Machine_Status IN ['RUNNING','PRODUCING','RUN','PROD'] THEN 100.0 WHEN m.Machine_Status IN [2,3] OR m.Machine_Status IN ['WARNING','SETUP','MAINTENANCE','STANDBY'] THEN 50.0 ELSE 0.0 END
